question_text: Two devices are left running for the same amount of time. Device X has a power rating of 500 W and Device Y has a power rating of 2000 W. Which statement is correct?

options.label: A
options.text: Device X transfers more energy because it has a lower power rating

options.label: B
options.text: Device Y transfers more energy because it has a higher power rating

options.label: C
options.text: Both devices transfer the same amount of energy

options.label: D
options.text: Device X transfers more energy because power rating does not affect energy transfer

correct_answer: B) Device Y transfers more energy because it has a higher power rating
explanation: A higher power rating means a device transfers energy at a faster rate. Since both devices run for the same time, Device Y with 2000 W transfers four times more energy than Device X with 500 W.
